technology_decisions.description: How to handle API calls to multiple LLM providers (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini)

options.name: Custom Adapter Pattern
options.description: Build a lightweight provider interface with adapter implementations per provider
cons: Need to handle SDK updates ourselves
options.recommendation_reason: Full control over streaming and error handling, critical for a playground tool

options.name: Vercel AI SDK
options.description: Vercel's unified AI SDK that abstracts multiple providers
cons: Opinionated API may not fit our needs

technology_decisions.user_choice_description: Build a lightweight provider interface with adapter implementations per provider
technology_decisions.user_reason: For a playground tool, we need precise control over streaming, token counting, and error handling per provider

technology_decisions.description: Rich text editor component for writing prompts with variable highlighting

options.name: CodeMirror 6
options.description: Modern, modular code editor with excellent extension support
pros: Custom language support easy to add
trade_offs: More flexible but requires more setup for features
options.recommendation_reason: Lightweight, modular, and easy to add custom syntax for {{variable}} highlighting

options.name: Monaco Editor
cons: Hard to customize for non-code content

technology_decisions.user_choice_description: Modern, modular code editor with excellent extension support
technology_decisions.user_reason: Prompts are text, not code — CodeMirror's flexibility is better suited than Monaco's code-centric features

technology_decisions.description: Library for computing and displaying text diffs between prompt versions

options.name: diff (npm)
options.description: Mature text diffing library with multiple algorithms
trade_offs: Small and focused but requires custom renderer
options.recommendation_reason: Lightweight, flexible, and we want custom diff rendering anyway

options.name: react-diff-viewer-continued
options.description: React component for displaying side-by-side or unified diffs
trade_offs: Faster to implement but harder to customize for prompt text

technology_decisions.user_choice_description: Mature text diffing library with multiple algorithms
technology_decisions.user_reason: We want word-level diffs for prompt text, not line-level code diffs

summary.estimated_learning_curve: Low to Medium — CodeMirror extensions require some ramp-up
